# GitHub Repo Setup Checklist

After creating the repository, configure these settings:

## Repository Topics

Add these topics in Settings → General → Topics:

```
algeria, dataset, geojson, wilayas, communes, open-data, typescript, postal-codes, geodata, dz, hacktoberfest
```

## About Section

Set the description to:
> All 69 Algerian wilayas, 597 dairas, 1,657 communes — JSON, CSV, GeoJSON, SQL. Postal codes, coordinates, bilingual names. npm install geoalgeria

## Social Preview

Upload a social preview image (1280x640) showing:
- The project name
- A map of Algeria with commune points
- Key stats: 69 wilayas, 1,657 communes, 6 formats

## GitHub Features to Enable

- [x] Issues
- [x] Discussions (for "Built with this data" showcases)
- [x] Sponsorship (link to yasser.studio)
- [ ] Wiki (not needed, docs are in-repo)
- [ ] Projects (not needed yet)

## Labels to Create

- `good first issue` — easy tasks for newcomers
- `data-correction` — wrong postal codes, coordinates, names
- `new-format` — requests for PHP, XML, YAML exports
- `delivery-zones` — carrier zone data contributions
- `coordinates` — missing lat/lng for 20 communes
- `help wanted` — needs community input

## First Issues to Create (Attract Contributors)

1. "Add coordinates for 20 communes missing lat/lng" (list them)
2. "Fill in Yalidine delivery zones from your account"
3. "Fill in ZR Express delivery zones"
4. "Add PHP array export format"
5. "Add YAML export format"
6. "Verify postal codes for wilayas 59-69"
